violations.description: Person in charge. — --Facility does not have certified food service manager.
Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. -Cook plated toast with bare hands.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found with 0ppm Quat and mixed with soapy water. *Dispenser does not appear to working correctly, made a fresh solution that showed less than 100ppm Quat. ***Solutions will need to be made manually until fixed. Maintain at 200-400ppm Quat per label instructions.

Reheating food. — --Commercially processed, properly packaged ready-to-eat food was not heated to a minimum temperature of 140F for hot holding. -Sliced (commercial) roast beef in broth started at 7:30am and found in crock pot on low at 8:30 with temp of 120F. *Turned up to high to finish heating before holding.--Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. -White gravy, brown gravy and mashed potatoes were placed into steam well for reheat at ~6:30 a.m. and found at ~8:15 am with temps of 77F-138F. *Directed to finish reheating at cook top. Gravies made it to 165 and 180F and returned to hot well; Potatoes were at 120F at ~8:45pm-recommended disposal.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Hamburger Stew, other food item (soup?) and open whip topping found in 3 door cooler not date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Ham and turkey in bottom of prep table dated 10/2. *Disposed of immediately. -3 door refrigerator: Chopped ham dated 10/11; beef dated 10/8 and other food item (pasta?) dated 9/29. *Cook is aware of the out dated items and plans to dispose of items today.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Heavy dust/debris at wall vent above mop sink. -Upright freezer near dish pit has residue at the handle and front upper corner with frost build up at interior surfaces. -Residue at handles of cookline equipment (ovens and under counter freezer). -Some carbon/debris at bottom interior of back room oven.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
